inputs.name: accessibleName
inputs.description: Defines the accessible name of the component.

inputs.name: accessibleNameRef
inputs.description: Receives id(or many ids) of the elements that label the component.

inputs.name: defaultColor
inputs.description:
Defines the default color of the component.

*Note:** The default color should be a part of the ColorPalette colors`

inputs.name: open
inputs.description: Defines the open | closed state of the popover.

inputs.name: opener
inputs.description:
Defines the ID or DOM Reference of the element that the popover is shown at.
When using this attribute in a declarative way, you must only use the `id` (as a string) of the element at which you want to show the popover.
You can only set the `opener` attribute to a DOM Reference when using JavaScript.

inputs.name: placement
inputs.description: Determines on which side the component is placed at.

inputs.name: showDefaultColor
inputs.description: Defines whether the user can choose the default color from a button.

inputs.name: showMoreColors
inputs.description: Defines whether the user can choose a custom color from a component.

inputs.name: showRecentColors
inputs.description: Defines whether the user can see the last used colors in the bottom of the component

outputs.name: ui5Close
outputs.description: Fired when the `ui5-color-palette-popover` is closed due to user interaction.

outputs.name: ui5ItemClick
outputs.description: Fired when the user selects a color.
